title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Rajgir
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Rajgir constituency.

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Rajgir assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Rajgir show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Rajgir triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Rajgir, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

title: High stakes battle in Rajgir as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Rajgir. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Political rally in Rajgir draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Rajgir promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
